_comment: Single source of truth for MESharp tool versions, keyed by tool Id (== AssemblyName == release asset stem). Bump a value, then `pwsh tools/ToolRelease.ps1` (menu) or `-Publish` to cut one umbrella `tools-vN` release bundling every ACTIVE discovered tool + a manifest. A tool missing from this map defaults to 1.0.0. Ids listed in _exclude are omitted from the build/release (toggle them in the menu); everything else ships.
